name: Creamy Slaw
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh or frozen chives
3 cups finely shredded green cabbage (about 1/2 large head)
1/2 cup finely chopped green onions (about 5 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large glass or plastic bowl, mix the buttermilk, chives, sour cream, lemon juice, caraway seed, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the cabbage, carrot, and onions to the mixture; toss until well combined.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for about 2 hours, or until chilled.
4. Serve and enjoy your creamy slaw.
6 servings
Variation: Creamy Jicama Slaw - Omit caraway seed. Substitute shredded jicama for 1 cup of the shredded cabbage.
